es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas con la ayuda de inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esto ha generado un gran debate en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: La empresa de música Amper Music ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias para obras de música creadas con inteligencia artificial. Esto permitirá a los productores y compositores obtener los derechos necesarios para utilizar estas obras en sus proyectos, lo que puede tener un impacto significativo en la industria musical.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Para registrar tus obras de música creadas con inteligencia artificial, es importante seguir los pasos adecuados. Primero, debes determinar si la obra es elegible para la protección de derechos de autor. Luego, debes registrar la obra en la oficina de derechos de autor correspondiente, como la Oficina de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos. Es importante tener en cuenta que las leyes y regulaciones pueden variar dependiendo del país, por lo que es recomendable consultar con un abogado especializado en derechos de autor.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created with the help of artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This has sparked a significant debate in the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun using AI to create music. Companies like Spotify and Apple Music are closely watching the developments, as they have already started to incorporate AI-generated music into their platforms.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Music company Amper Music has launched a licensing platform for AI-generated music. This will allow producers and composers to obtain the necessary rights to use these works in their projects, which could have a significant impact on the music industry. The platform will provide a range of licensing options, including sync licenses and mechanical licenses, and will also offer a database of AI-generated music tracks.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI Works
sections.content: To register your AI-generated music, you need to follow the correct steps. First, you need to determine if the work is eligible for copyright protection. Then, you need to register the work with the relevant copyright office, such as the US Copyright Office. It's essential to note that laws and regulations may vary depending on the country, so it's recommended to consult with a copyright lawyer. Additionally, you should keep records of your creative process, including any human input or collaboration, as this may be relevant in case of any copyright disputes.
